source_snippet:
Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes
Draft
April 29, 2026
Abstract
For fixed h, let N(h,k) be the least N such that every cardinality |hA| attained by a
k-element set of integers is also attained by a k-element subset of {1,...,N}. We prove,
using Rajagopal’s fixed-h theorem on the range of possible values of |hA|, that
N(h,k)≤kCh
for every fixed h. The new ingredient is a polynomial-diameter replacement for the sparse
geometric blocks in Rajagopal’s large-value construction. The replacement is carried out
at the level of the low-degree Hilbert functions, which are the only data relevant to h-fold
sumsets when h is fixed.
title: 步骤_step1 (定义固定 $h$ 下的最小压缩...)
description: 定义固定 $h$ 下的最小压缩界 $N(h,k)$，刻画其与 $k$ 元整数集 $h$ 重和集基数 $|hA|$ 的对应关系。 [核心键点: 最小 $N$ 的存在性与定义域约束 $\{1,\dots,N\}$。; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: def N (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := sorry -- 最小 N 使得 ∀ A : Finset ℤ, A.card = k → ∃ B ⊆ Finset.Icc 1 N, B.card = k ∧ (h • B).card = (h • A).card

source_snippet:
Polynomial compression for fixed-fold sumset sizes
Draft
April 29, 2026
Abstract
For fixed h, let N(h,k) be the least N such that every cardinality |hA| attained by a
k-element set of integers is also attained by a k-element subset of {1,...,N}. We prove,
using Rajagopal’s fixed-h theorem on the range of possible values of |hA|, that
N(h,k)≤kCh
for every fixed h. The new ingredient is a polynomial-diameter replacement for the sparse
geometric blocks in Rajagopal’s large-value construction. The replacement is carried out
at the level of the low-degree Hilbert functions, which are the only data relevant to h-fold
sumsets when h is fixed.
title: 步骤_step2 (基于 Rajagopal 的固...)
description: 基于 Rajagopal 的固定 $h$ 定理，建立 $N(h,k)$ 关于 $k$ 的多项式上界 $k^{C_h}$。 [核心键点: 利用已知定理推导多项式压缩界。; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: theorem polynomial_compression_bound (h : ℕ) : ∃ C_h : ℕ, ∀ k : ℕ, N h k ≤ k ^ C_h := by sorry

title: 步骤_step3 (构造多项式直径替代物以替换原稀...)
description: 构造多项式直径替代物以替换原稀疏几何块，并在低次 Hilbert 函数层面验证其等价性。 [核心键点: 几何块替换与 Hilbert 函数不变性。; 来源: p1_s12 页1]
lean_code: lemma hilbert_function_preservation (h : ℕ) (A : Finset ℤ) : ∃ B : Finset ℕ, B.card = A.card ∧ hilbert_function h B = hilbert_function h A := by sorry

source_snippet:
1 Introduction
For a finite set A ⊂ Z and a positive integer h, write
hA = {a +···+a : a ∈ A}
1 h i
with repetitions allowed. Define
R(h,k) = {|hA| : A ⊂ Z, |A| = k}.
Let N(h,k) be the least positive integer N such that
R(h,k) = {|hA| : A ⊆ {1,...,N}, |A| = k}.
Equivalently, one may work in intervals [0,N −1] and translate at the end.
The purpose of this note is to prove the following polynomial compression bound.
title: 步骤_step1 (定义有限集 $A$ 的 $h$...)
description: 定义有限集 $A$ 的 $h$ 重和集 $hA$，明确允许元素重复的加法组合。 [核心键点: Sumset definition with repetition; 来源: p1_s22 页1]
lean_code: def h_fold_sumset (A : Finset ℤ) (h : ℕ) : Finset ℤ := sorry

title: 步骤_step1 (陈述定理核心不等式，建立 $N...)
description: 陈述定理核心不等式，建立 $N(h,k)$ 关于 $k$ 和 $h$ 的指数上界。 [核心键点: 固定 $h$ 后存在常数 $C$ 控制求和集规模增长; 来源: p1_s999 页1]

title: 步骤_step2 (引入组合常数 $M$ 与 $K...)
description: 引入组合常数 $M$ 与 $K$ 的显式定义，为后续集合构造提供参数。 [核心键点: 利用二项式系数定义辅助量 $M$ 和 $K$; 来源: p1_s999 页1]
lean_code:
def M (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := Nat.choose (h + k - 1) h
def K (h k : ℕ) : ℕ := Nat.choose (h + k - 1) k

title: 步骤_step3 (通过有限个闭区间的并集构造集合...)
description: 通过有限个闭区间的并集构造集合 $\Delta$，刻画可能的求和集大小分布。 [核心键点: 基于 $M$ 和步长 $h$ 的区间平移与并集操作; 来源: p1_s999 页1]
lean_code: def Delta (h k : ℕ) : Set ℤ := ⋃ ℓ ∈ Finset.range (min h k - 2), Icc (M h k + ℓ * h + 1) (M h k + ℓ * h + (h - 2 - ℓ)) := by sorry

title: 步骤_step4 (明确区间记号 $[u,v]$ ...)
description: 明确区间记号 $[u,v]$ 的数学约定，处理空区间边界情况。 [核心键点: 整数区间的标准定义及 $u>v$ 时的空集约定; 来源: p1_s999 页1]
lean_code: lemma interval_def (u v : ℤ) : (u ≤ v → Icc u v = {n : ℤ | u ≤ n ∧ n ≤ v}) ∧ (u > v → Icc u v = ∅) := by sorry
